# Reponomics Dashboard

This repository was generated from the [Reponomics Dashboard template repo](https://github.com/reponomics/reponomics-dashboard).

The Reponomics Dashboard provides users with a convenient, private, and cost-free way to store and aggregate key metrics about their GitHub repos. Because this data is private, we do not publish any metrics to the README for public repositories.

Reponomics may update managed local documentation under `docs/reponomics/` before future collect runs. To opt out before editing that directory yourself, set `allow_docs_sync: false` in `config.yaml`.

If you'd like to learn more about the Reponomics Dashboard and create one for yourself, check out our doc-site at [reponomics/reponomics](https://github.com/reponomics/reponomics), or view a demo dashboard [here](https://github.com/reponomics/reponomics-demo).

Thanks!
